name: Peanut Butter/Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, bran, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Add the egg, peanut butter, low-fat milk, and chopped peanuts to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix all the ingredients until well combined.
4. Spoon the batter into an oiled muffin tin or paper muffin cups.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Makes 8 muffins.
One Muffin:
Calories: 140
Carbohydrates: 12
Protein: 6
Fat: 9
Sodium: 104
Potassium: 184
Cholesterol: 35
Exchange Value: 1 Bread Exchange + 2 Fat Exchanges
Source: Holiday Cookbook, American Diabetes Association, ISBN 0-13-024894-0, by Betty Wedman, M.S.,R.D.
